name: Chili a La Franey
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Beef, very lean, coarse grind
1 pound Pork, very lean, coarse grind
recipeInstructions:
1. If possible, have the beef and pork ground together, or mix the meats together in a bowl.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat.
3. Add the meat to the pot. Break up any lumps with a fork and cook, stirring occasionally, until the meat is evenly browned.
4. Add the onions, green pepper, celery, garlic, oregano, bay leaves, and cumin. Mix well.
5. Add the tomatoes, beef broth, water, salt, pepper, caribe, and ground chile. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer, uncovered, for about 20 minutes. Stir often.
6. Add the beans and simmer for an additional 10 minutes longer. Taste and adjust seasonings.
